steps.title: Name the shared purpose
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between Bear Valley NWR and Moapa Valley NWR. The notes show that both refuges were established to protect endangered species, even though they protect different species and differ in size.

steps.title: Reject one-sided details
steps.content: Choice A mentions only Bear Valley. Choice B mentions only Moapa Valley. Choice C contrasts the refuges by acreage, which emphasizes a difference rather than a similarity. The answer is D.
